The famous king of the Singasari Kingdom was King ___.

questions.text: The famous Prime Minister Gajah Mada made a promise called the Oath of ___, vowing to unite Nusantara.
During which king's reign did the Majapahit Kingdom reach its golden age?
The famous king of Majapahit was King ___.
The Prime Minister of Majapahit was ___.
The Oath made by Gajah Mada was called the Oath of ___.
Explain what the Prasasti Ciaruteun tells us about the Kingdom of Tarumanegara. Who was mentioned and what was described about him?
questions.answer: Model answer: The Prasasti Ciaruteun (Ciaruteun Inscription) reports about the famous King Purnawarman of the Tarumanegara Kingdom. The inscription describes his reign and achievements, serving as one of the oldest historical records from the Hindu period in Indonesia.

questions.text: Describe what happened to the Kingdom of Tarumanegara in the year 650. Which kingdom attacked it and what was the outcome?
questions.answer: Model answer: In the year 650, the Kingdom of Tarumanegara was attacked and defeated by another kingdom. This marked the beginning of the decline of Tarumanegara as a major power in West Java.

questions.text: How did the Hindu Kingdom of Mataram end, and what two kingdoms emerged from its division? Who ruled each kingdom?
questions.answer: Model answer: The Hindu Kingdom of Mataram was divided into two kingdoms: Panjalu (also known as Kediri) and Janggala. Panjalu was ruled by the Hindu dynasty while Janggala was under Buddhist influence. This division weakened Mataram and eventually led to the rise of other kingdoms.

questions.text: Describe the role of Gajah Mada in the Majapahit Kingdom. What was the Palapa Oath and what did he vow to do?
questions.answer: Model answer: Gajah Mada was the famous Prime Minister (Mahapatih) of the Majapahit Kingdom under King Hayam Wuruk. He made the Palapa Oath, vowing not to eat palapa (a spice) until he had united all of Nusantara under Majapahit. His leadership helped expand Majapahit's power across the Indonesian archipelago.

questions.text: How did the Singasari Kingdom end? Who was involved and what was the situation in Java after its fall?
questions.answer: Model answer: The Singasari Kingdom ended when it was conquered and destroyed by the Mongols in 1292. After its fall, Raden Wijaya (son-in-law of the last Singasari king) founded the Majapahit Kingdom, which later became the largest empire in Indonesian history.
